title: 203rd Division
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{MilitaryUnit |image=[[File:203rd-troopers.png]] |name=203rd Division |type= |formation=[[Division/Legends|Division]]''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' |commander=[[Unidentified clone trooper officer (203rd Division)|Unidentified clone trooper officer]][[Dark Times 2|''Dark Times'' 2]] |second= |staff=*[[Unidentified clone trooper lieutenant (New Plympto)|Unidentified clone lieutenant]][[Republic 79|''Republic'' 79]] *[[Unidentified clone sergeant (203rd Division)|Unidentified clone sergeant]] |subunit= |strength=[[Clone stormtrooper]]s |vehicles=[[Alpha-3 Nimbus-class V-wing starfighter/Legends|Alpha-3 ''Nimbus''-class V-wing starfighters]] |headquarters= |location=[[New Plympto/Legends|New Plympto]] |battles=[[Cleansing of New Plympto]] |formed= |founded= |fragmented= |reorganized= |dissolved= |restored= |affiliation=*[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] **[[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] *[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] **[[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] }} {{Quote|You had an infiltrator?''"
"''The 203rd did.|Commanders Appo and Vill of the 501st Legion|[[Dark Times 4|''Dark Times'' 4]]}} The '''203rd Division''' was a [[clone stormtrooper]] [[Division/Legends|division]] that was situated on [[New Plympto/Legends|New Plympto]] and served the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. Initially, the 203rd served in the Empire's predecessor, the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], with at least one member of the division, a [[Unidentified clone trooper lieutenant (New Plympto)|clone lieutenant]], being involved in the search for the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Dass Jennir]] during the implementation of [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]]. They were headquartered in a [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]], for which they provided security, on the surface near the local [[501st Legion/Legends|501st Legion]] headquarters, of which a [[Unidentified brigade (501st Legion)|brigade]] had been tasked with eliminating the local resistance. Jennir, who became a resistance fighter and fugitive, managed to impersonate a [[Clone Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] of the 501st and steal an [[Alpha-3 Nimbus-class V-wing starfighter/Legends|Alpha-3 ''Nimbus''-class V-wing starfighter]] which was being serviced by a member of the 203rd. The trooper of the 203rd was refueling the craft when Jennir kicked him down and stole the fighter. As he left, other clones of the division went on alert. Jennir soon launched a faux attack on civilian ships in the spaceport in a ruse to have them all take off and leave New Plympto, all while allowing his crew to escape as well. [[Unidentified clone trooper officer (203rd Division)|An officer]] of the 203rd ordered clone pilots to stop the evacuating ships and to get airborne, but they were unsuccessful. The incident was later recounted by 501st Legion [[Clone Commander/Legends|Commanders]] [[Appo/Legends|CC-1119]] "Appo" and "[[Vill]]."[[Dark Times 3|''Dark Times'' 3]] The 203rd Division sported [[Phase II clone trooper armor/Legends|Phase II clone trooper armor]] that sported a [[Color/Legends|yellow]] have circle on the right side of the [[Helmet/Legends|helmet]] and a yellow utility belt. Along with the officer, and the lieutenant, a [[Unidentified clone sergeant (203rd Division)|sergeant]] also served in the unit. {{Military-stub}} ==Appearances== *[[Republic 79|''Republic'' 79]] {{1st}} *[[Dark Times 2|''Dark Times'' 2]] *[[Dark Times 4|''Dark Times'' 4]] {{Mo}} {{1stID|203rd}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' {{1stID|203rd Division}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=203. }} [[Category:Grand Army of the Republic divisions]] [[Category:Imperial Army divisions]] [[Category:Stormtrooper units]]
